items.title: The Knicks outscored opponents by 6.3 PPG in reg season. Now 17.6 in playoffs. This is not normal

The Knicks outscored opponents by 6.3 PPG in reg season. Now 17.6 in playoffs. This is not normal

Biggest Increase In Average MOV
Reg Season to Playoffs, Min. 10 Games

2026 Knicks     +11.3
2001 Lakers     +9.4
1961 Celtics     +5.9
2009 Nuggets  +5.2
2023 Nuggets   +5.0
2017 Cavaliers   +4.8

items.author: NBA Stat
items.body_excerpt:
In the summer of 2018, the narrative spread about how soft KAT and Andrew Wiggins were after Jimmy Butler went to the media calling them out when he beat them with third-stringers during practice…

Wiggins won it all in 2022 and KAT is now 2 WINS away from a championship.

🤷‍♂️

#NBA

items.title: 2001 Lakers.
items.author: NBA
items.body_excerpt:
2001 Lakers.
2026 Knicks.

With their 8th straight road playoff victory in Game 2, New York has tied the 2001 Lakers for the longest road win streak in a single postseason in NBA history 🔥

The Knicks bring a 2-0 NBA Finals lead back to MSG for Game 3 on Monday at 8:30pm/et on ABC and ESPN. 🏆

items.title: “We need him to be him."
items.author: Jeff McDonald
items.body_excerpt:
“We need him to be him."

If there is any solace for the Spurs after a last-second Game 2 loss, it's that Victor Wembanyama seemed to remember he is Victor Wembanyama.

The path back into this Finals series -- if there is one -- begins there:

www.expressnews.com/sports/spurs... via @expressnews

media.title: Why Spurs' NBA Finals chances start with Wembanyama remembering what he can do
media.description: The San Antonio Spurs' path back into the NBA Finals against the New York Knicks starts with Victor Wembanyama remembering he is Victor Wembanyama.
